textByHash.9c07b01e6f18605b59c51e5f1f91f6b104cd398a: Greetings! I'm Cassim. Welcome to my home.
textByHash.69566cdac7effef0562ff94e51c1162419ba7f65: Isn't it just! I'm a bit of a connoisseur.
textByHash.9677b41314598dec749741a3c63b3e766ffc91df: I've dabbled, but this is all imported. I have a connection in the far west who has the best vineyards.
textByHash.2d8a8b6dadafb159ae00ef96fcd47d09b7f0eaef: Yes! A fine Hosidius grape, strong hints of plum and blackberry, very sweet.
textByHash.4c909e549da0bf5816a5e04f448d1bcbaa2ea63e: It's fantastic! Ali really knows how to brew a fine tea!
textByHash.ab6ff0803c2b1d255a7167f777c1f5b0a6598ff6: Well I've supplied him with a small import of mine. I call the concoction 'Zamorak's Fire'.
textByHash.b9c893fbd79a0502f0f10a749f860c6b82b3ad71: Yes, yes. It has a certain kick to it! Although, it'll keep you safe from fire for a short time after drinking!
textByHash.d93bf1247808cceff49345cf1b4d02deed5577bc: You never know... Dragons can be sneaky.
textByHash.7d16345f3532822b6a5fe4e1b05652c5032ac845: May the flames of Zamorak light your path.
